stories.title: The fascinating conflict between drafting in the t...
stories.summary: As the NBA considers dramatic lottery reform, the numbers show that drafting in the top five hasn't turned into NBA titles over the past 20 years.

stories.title: NBA draft lottery reform: Pros and cons of the new...
stories.summary: Tim Bontemps examines the good, the bad and the head-scratching changes coming to the draft lottery.

stories.title: Chiefs' Kelce joining Guardians ownership group
stories.summary: Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce is joining the Guardians' ownership group as a minority investor, he told ESPN, purchasing a stake in the team he grew up watching.

stories.title: FIFA subpoenaed over World Cup ticket practices
stories.summary: New York and New Jersey have subpoenaed FIFA as part of an investigation into its ticketing prices for the 2026 World Cup, citing soaring ticket prices and reports that fans were misled about seat locations.

stories.title: Bednar: Avalanche ran 'into a buzz saw in Vegas'
stories.summary: The Avalanche head into a long offseason after the Presidents' Trophy winners were swept out of the Western Conference finals by the Golden Knights.
